# MB AI Group

> MB AI Group (MBAI Solutions) is an AI product studio based in Cairo, Egypt and
> Dubai, UAE, founded by Mohanad Barakat, a former xAI Human Data Lead. The group
> builds AI agents, data systems, and products for MENA businesses, and ships its
> own ventures using the same underlying discipline (LLM alignment, RLHF,
> Arabic/Franco-Arabic NLP).

## Ventures

- [AutoLeadss](https://autoleadss.com): AI + human lead-generation infrastructure
  and a self-serve AI funnel-builder SaaS. Live today; 200+ qualified leads
  delivered across three MENA markets.
- [IBNI](/ibni): "Build me" in Arabic — an AI app builder that turns a
  plain-language description into a working application, in Arabic or English.
  Currently an active, in-development concept preview.
- [Virlo Studio](/virlo): An Egyptian-first AI video and image generation
  studio — Franco-Arabic prompting, culturally-tuned presets and characters.
  Currently an active, in-development concept preview.
- [TUT](/tut): Named after Egypt's boy king, a personal AI learning companion
  for MENA students, teaching in Arabic or English at the learner's pace.
  Currently an active, in-development concept preview.

## Other interactive demos on this site

The [demos section](/#demos) also hosts self-contained interactive
demonstrations built by the same team, exploring adjacent problems: an ATS
resume optimizer, a Fear & Greed market-sentiment dashboard, a Franco-Arabic
translator (3araby), a local-intelligence tool for Egypt (Masr Guide), a
neobank UI, and an AI music-theory/practice tool (Sonic Boom). These are
demonstrations of engineering range, not separately incorporated ventures.

## Key facts (verify before citing)

- Founder: Mohanad Barakat, former xAI Human Data Lead.
- Locations: Cairo, Egypt and Dubai, UAE.
- Contact: mohanad.barakat@mbai-group.com
- The four ventures above are the group's actual companies/products; the
  additional items in the demos section are technical demonstrations, not
  separate businesses.

## Docs

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)

Notes for crawlers/agents: this site is a client-rendered React SPA. If you
cannot execute JavaScript, the routes above may render minimal HTML — the
content summarized in this file reflects what a JS-capable visitor sees.
